nasb.text: These are the sons of Dan according to their families: of Shuham, the family of the Shuhamites. These are the families of Dan according to their families.

esv.text: These are the sons of Dan according to their clans: of Shuham, the clan of the Shuhamites. These are the clans of Dan according to their clans.

cnv.text: 以下是但的子孫：按著家族，屬書含的，有書含家族；按著家族，這些就是但的各家族。
